text: At the post office, I sent a postcard to my family.
Now I want to see my friends this weekend.

I am meeting Lucas at four oclock.
We are going to the movies on Saturday.
Lets meet up at the cafe.
Why dont we get together downtown?
Hey Gabriela! We are getting together on Saturday. Are you free?
In the morning Im busy, but in the afternoon Im free! Where are we meeting?
Lets meet up at the cafe downtown at four. Then we are going to the movies.
Sounds great! What time is the movie? I want to be on time.
It starts at six. Why dont we hang out at the cafe first?
Perfect plan! Im really looking forward to it. See you on Saturday!
Im meeting Lucas at four oclock.
Are you free on Saturday?
Im looking forward to it. Please be on time.

Hi Gabriela, it's Lucas! I'm calling about this weekend. So, a few of us are getting together on Saturday afternoon. We're meeting at the cafe downtown at four o'clock, the one near the park. After that, we're going to the movies at six. I'm really looking forward to it. I know you are busy with your French class in the morning, but are you free in the afternoon? Why don't you come with us? Let's hang out, it's going to be so much fun. Oh, and please be on time, because the movie starts early. Send me a message and tell me your plan. Talk soon, bye!

This is my plan for Saturday. In the morning I'm not free, because I have my French class. But in the afternoon I'm meeting my friends downtown. We're getting together at the cafe near the park at four o'clock. Lucas is coming too, and I'm really looking forward to it. After the cafe, we're going to the movies at six, so I need to be on time. In the evening I'm not busy, so maybe we will hang out a little more. I love making plans with my friends in English. It feels great to say where I'm going and what I'm doing this weekend.

First, you send a message to your friend. Next, you suggest a time and you say, let's meet at four. After that, your friend asks, where are we getting together? Then, you agree on a place and you say, we're meeting at the cafe downtown. Finally, you confirm the plan and you say, see you on Saturday, don't be late.
